title: 7 of the Top Restaurant Stocks to Serve Up
text: There's a lot going on these days, so it's best to keep it safe and simple when you're investing. Restaurant stocks offer a perfect solution.

title: 5 Stocks to Gift Your Loved Ones This Valentine Day
text: Amazon (AMZN), Darden Restaurants (DRI), Dollar Tree (DLTR), Hershey (HSY), and Signet Jewelers (SIG) could see a boost in sales as Valentine's Day spending is expected to be the second-highest in 15 years.
